pattern: Counting distinct covered points on a small number line reduces to marking every point each interval spans and counting the marks.
hints: Each car covers every integer point from its start to its end, inclusive.
A point covered by more than one car should still only be counted once.
Mark every point covered by any interval in a set (or boolean array) and return how many distinct points ended up marked.

edge_inputs.description: one interval spanning the entire allowed range
fully nested interval should not add new points
several disjoint intervals with a gap between them

stress.description: random overlapping intervals across the full coordinate range
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = max(1, min(size, 100))
    nums = []
    for _ in range(n):
        s = rng.randint(1, 100)
        e = rng.randint(s, 100)
        nums.append([s, e])
    return [nums]
